fix_applied.reason: Per AACT 2026-04-12 NCT02601313 is ZUMA-2 (Brexucabtagene Autoleucel in R/R Mantle Cell Lymphoma), not ZUMA-1 (axi-cel in R/R LBCL = NCT02348216). The review labelled this entry 'ZUMA-1' under the wrong NCT; data may correspond to either trial. Nulling NCT to force re-extraction.
fix_applied.aact_title: Study of Brexucabtagene Autoleucel (KTE-X19) in Participants With Relapsed/Refractory Mantle Cell Lymphoma

duplicate_review_pairs.reason: Singular/plural variant of the same review topic; shared trial set with divergent extracted values. Recommend: keep one, delete the other (user judgment — neither auto-deletable).
Acronym-variant of the same review topic (JAKi vs JAK); shared trial set (baricitinib + upadacitinib + filgotinib RA trials) with divergent extracted values. Recommend: keep one, delete the other.

divergent_value_pairs.issue: Different extracted N: (14,14,8,13) vs (79,79,35,79) — one is wrong.
ESKETAMINE_TRD has continuous (N=114,109); DEPRESSION_NEW_RAPID has binary (36/115 vs 30/113). May be different outcomes — verify.
AML_TARGETED has (188/245, 89/122 HR 0.76); AML_VEN_FLT3_NMA has (145/268, 169/271 HR 0.78). Different outcomes likely (OS vs EFS).
ACORAMIDIS_ATTR_CM has (76/421, 62/211 HR 0.78); ATTR_CM has (79/409, 52/202 HR 0.72). Close but not identical — extraction noise.
Adjuvant melanoma trial legitimately in all three (1L-therapy review is mixed metastatic+adjuvant). HR differs 0.65 vs 0.71 vs 0.71 — likely OS vs RFS endpoint difference.
BIMEKIZUMAB has (273/349, 1/86 OR 67.27); IL_PSORIASIS_NMA has (318/349, 1/86 OR 871.9). Event counts diverge (273 vs 318) — one wrong.
